name: Venison Marinade
directions: Whisk all ingredients together and marinate the steaks for 2 hours.

name: Green Bean Relish
directions: Cover and refrigerate at least 8 hours.

name: The Best Nacho Dip Ever
directions: Thoroughly mix cream cheese, sour cream and mayo.
Spread evenly in the bottom of a serving dish or plastic container with lid.
Layer the remaining ingredients, in order, over your base layer.
Allow to set in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Serve alone or with nacho chips.

name: Loveless Seasoned Salt
directions: Mix all the ingredients together and store in an air-tight container.

name: Loveless Dry Rub
directions: Mix all the ingredients together.  Store in an airtight container until ready to use.
When ready, rub the seasoning into all sides of your meat until it is covered.  Grill or cook your meat as you prefer.
